info.title: Provii Verifier API
info.description: Zero-knowledge proof based age verification service. This API enables privacy-preserving age verification without revealing personal information.

tags.name: Challenge
tags.description: Challenge creation, polling, and redemption for age verification

tags.name: Hosted
tags.description: Browser-facing hosted verification flow endpoints for the provii-agegate SDK

post.description: Creates a new challenge for age verification using PKCE flow. The origin must be pre-approved.

parameters.name: Origin
parameters.description: Origin of the request. Must be in the approved origins list.

parameters.name: X-API-Key
parameters.description: API key issued to the relying party.

schema.title: CreateChallengeRequest
schema.description:
Request body for `POST /v1/challenge`.

SECURITY: The `authorizer` field carries the HMAC-SHA256 signature, nonce, and
timestamp that authenticate the caller. The `code_challenge` binds the session
to the PKCE flow so proof submission requires the matching code verifier.

code_challenge.description: PKCE code challenge encoded as base64url (exactly 32 bytes).

method.description: PKCE method. Only S256 is supported.

verifying_key_id.description: Optional verifying key identifier, validated against the origin policy.

expires_in.description: Requested challenge lifetime in seconds (clamped to policy and system limits).

authorizer.description: HMAC authentication envelope (key_id, timestamp, hmac, nonce).

ExpiresIn.description: TTL for a challenge, clamped to `[MIN, MAX]` on construction.

Authorizer.description:
Shared HMAC-based authorizer used by relying parties when calling the API.

SECURITY: `hmac` and `nonce` are secret authentication material. The `Debug`
impl redacts them to prevent accidental logging (ASVS V11.7.2).
`Zeroize` + `ZeroizeOnDrop` ensure they are cleared from memory on drop.

keyId.description: Identifier of the client credential used to authenticate the request.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) included in the canonical signing payload.

hmac.description: Hex-encoded HMAC (SHA-256) over the canonical message.

nonce.description:
SECURITY: Cryptographic nonce for replay protection (64 hex chars / 256 bits).
Required for nonce-based replay attack prevention (ASVS V6.1.3).

schema.title: ChallengeResponse
schema.description:
Successful response from `POST /v1/challenge`.

Contains everything the client needs to display a QR code (or short code)
and later submit a zero knowledge proof against `rp_challenge`.

short_code.description: 12-digit numeric short code for accessibility (displayed as XXXX XXXX XXXX).

short_code_formatted.description: Human-readable formatted short code: "XXXX XXXX XXXX".

cutoff_days.description: Age cutoff in epoch days used by the ZK circuit.

verifying_key_id.description: Verifying key identifier selected for this challenge.

submit_secret.description: Base64url-encoded submit secret (32 bytes). Required for proof submission.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when this challenge expires.

proof_direction.description: Direction of the age proof: over_age or under_age.

status_url.description: URL to poll for challenge status updates.

verify_url.description: URL to submit the zero knowledge proof.

UuidV4.description: UUID wrapper constrained to version 4 values.

CutoffDays.description: Strongly typed wrapper around a cutoff expressed in epoch days.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit resets

get.description: Check the current status of a challenge

post.description: Complete verification by providing PKCE code_verifier

code_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier (43-128 unreserved characters, RFC 7636 appendix B).

PkceCodeVerifier.description:
PKCE `code_verifier` value constrained to the RFC 7636 character set.

SECURITY: The code verifier is a high-entropy secret used exactly once.
It is zeroised on drop and redacted in Debug output.

verified.description: `true` when the challenge has been successfully redeemed.

schema.title: SubmitProofRequest
schema.description:
Top-level request body for `POST /v1/verify`.

All fields are required. Unknown fields are rejected at deserialisation.

submit_secret.description: Anti-abuse secret (base64url, 32 bytes). Compared in constant time.

proof.description: The Groth16 age proof and its public inputs.

UuidV4.description: UUID wrapper constrained to version 4 values.

AgeProofJson.description: Groth16 age proof with its associated public inputs.

verifying_key_id.description: Identifier selecting the verifying key registered for this origin.

public.description: Public inputs fed into the Groth16 verifier.

proof.description: Groth16 proof bytes (base64url, exactly 192 bytes decoded).

PublicInputsJson.description:
Public inputs that the SNARK circuit constrains.

Every field is re-validated against the stored challenge record before the
proof is passed to the Groth16 verifier.

cutoff_days.description: Minimum age threshold in days (e.g. 6570 for 18 years).

rp_challenge.description: Relying-party challenge (base64url, 32 bytes). Blake2s-256 hashed before circuit input.

cred_nullifier.description: Credential nullifier (base64url, 32 bytes). Checked against the ban list.

CutoffDays.description: Strongly typed wrapper around a cutoff expressed in epoch days.

IssuerKeyJson.description: Issuer verifying key transmitted as raw bytes (not a hash).

value.description:
Raw RedJubjub verifying key bytes (base64url-encoded, 32 bytes).
Fed directly as public inputs 4 and 5 of the Groth16 circuit.

result.description: `"OK"` on success, or an error code such as `"INVALID_PROOF"`.

get.description: Returns detailed health status including subsystem checks for challenge store, nonce store, JWKS cache, rate limiter, and ban store
Returns metrics in Prometheus text exposition format

post.description: Endpoint for browsers to submit Content Security Policy violation reports. Returns 204 with no body.

get.description: Interactive API documentation rendered from the OpenAPI specification
Returns full challenge details including short code, deep link data, and expiry. Used by the wallet app to display challenge information.

schema.title: ChallengeDetailsResponse
schema.description:
Full challenge details returned by `GET /v1/challenge/:id`.

Includes `submit_secret` because access requires the 122-bit UUID capability
(obtained via QR deep link), not the lower-entropy short code.

short_code.description: 12-digit numeric short code for accessibility (displayed as XXXX XXXX XXXX).

short_code_formatted.description: Human-readable formatted short code: "XXXX XXXX XXXX".

cutoff_days.description: Age cutoff in epoch days used by the ZK circuit.

verifying_key_id.description: Verifying key identifier selected for this challenge.

submit_secret.description: Base64url-encoded submit secret (32 bytes). Required for proof submission.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when this challenge expires.

proof_direction.description: Direction of the age proof: over_age or under_age.

status_url.description: URL to poll for challenge status updates.

verify_url.description: URL to submit the zero knowledge proof.

UuidV4.description: UUID wrapper constrained to version 4 values.

CutoffDays.description: Strongly typed wrapper around a cutoff expressed in epoch days.

get.summary: Look up challenge by short code
get.description: Retrieves challenge details using the 12-digit numeric short code (formatted as XXXX XXXX XXXX). Used for manual code entry as an alternative to QR scanning.

schema.title: ChallengeDetailsResponse
schema.description:
Full challenge details returned by `GET /v1/challenge/:id`.

Includes `submit_secret` because access requires the 122-bit UUID capability
(obtained via QR deep link), not the lower-entropy short code.

short_code.description: 12-digit numeric short code for accessibility (displayed as XXXX XXXX XXXX).

short_code_formatted.description: Human-readable formatted short code: "XXXX XXXX XXXX".

cutoff_days.description: Age cutoff in epoch days used by the ZK circuit.

verifying_key_id.description: Verifying key identifier selected for this challenge.

submit_secret.description: Base64url-encoded submit secret (32 bytes). Required for proof submission.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when this challenge expires.

proof_direction.description: Direction of the age proof: over_age or under_age.

status_url.description: URL to poll for challenge status updates.

verify_url.description: URL to submit the zero knowledge proof.

UuidV4.description: UUID wrapper constrained to version 4 values.

CutoffDays.description: Strongly typed wrapper around a cutoff expressed in epoch days.

404.description: No challenge found for this code

post.description: Registers a new origin for testing in the sandbox environment. Not available in production.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit resets

post.description: Simulates a wallet proof submission for testing. Only available in sandbox environment.

404.description: Not found (production) or challenge not found

post.description: VA-API-006: Initiates a new hosted verification session for the provii-agegate SDK. Creates a PKCE flow, generates a provii-verifier challenge, and returns session details including QR code data.

parameters.name: X-Public-Key
parameters.description: Public key identifier of the relying party (pk_live_* or pk_test_*).

parameters.name: Origin
parameters.description: Origin of the request. Validated against the allowed origins for the public key.

403.description: Origin not allowed or invalid public key

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit resets

get.description: VA-API-006: Alias endpoint. Hosted challenge details are returned by the challenge creation endpoint. This path is reserved for future use.

404.description: Not found. Hosted challenges are not individually retrievable via this path.

get.description: VA-API-006: Returns the current verification state of a hosted session. Used by provii-agegate for polling-based status updates.

parameters.name: X-Public-Key
parameters.description: Public key identifier of the relying party.

post.description: VA-API-006: Proof submission in the hosted flow is handled by the wallet via the expert-mode POST /v1/verify endpoint. This path is documented for completeness but the wallet submits directly to /v1/verify with the submit_secret and challenge_id from the hosted session.

200.description: Proof accepted. See POST /v1/verify for the full schema.

post.description: VA-API-006: Completes the hosted verification flow. The browser SDK sends the PKCE code_verifier, which is SHA-256 hashed and compared in constant time against the stored code_challenge.

parameters.name: X-Public-Key
parameters.description: Public key identifier of the relying party.

403.description: PKCE mismatch or CSRF validation failure

get.description: VA-API-006: Generates a session-bound CSRF token for use in subsequent mutating hosted requests (redeem, logout). The token is HMAC-signed and bound to the session ID.

post.description: VA-API-006: Terminates the user's session by clearing the session cookie and issuing a Clear-Site-Data header. Does not require authentication since sessions are stateless (HMAC-signed tokens).

get.description: VA-API-006: Upgrades the HTTP connection to a WebSocket for real-time verification status push notifications. Replaces polling for supported clients. Requires a one-time HMAC-signed ticket appended as a query parameter.

Top-level request body for `POST /v1/verify`.

All fields are required. Unknown fields are rejected at deserialisation.

submit_secret.description: Anti-abuse secret (base64url, 32 bytes). Compared in constant time.

proof.description: The Groth16 age proof and its public inputs.

PkceCodeVerifier.description:
PKCE `code_verifier` value constrained to the RFC 7636 character set.

SECURITY: The code verifier is a high-entropy secret used exactly once.
It is zeroised on drop and redacted in Debug output.

code_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier (43-128 unreserved characters, RFC 7636 appendix B).

verified.description: `true` when the challenge has been successfully redeemed.

ErrorResponse.description: ADV-VA-05-012: Canonical 5-key error envelope serialised by all error paths.

field.description: Name of the offending request field, if applicable.

detail.description: Safe human-readable diagnostic detail. Never contains secret material.

origin.description: Origin URL to register for testing

min_age_years.description: Minimum age in years (default 18). Used for over_age proofs.

api_key.description: API key for the test origin

max_age_years.description: Maximum age in years. Required when proof_direction is under_age.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when the registration expires

already_existed.description: True if the origin was already registered (idempotent hit)

challenge_id.description: Challenge UUID to simulate proof for

publicKey.description: Public key identifier (also accepted via X-Public-Key header).

origin.description: Origin (auto-extracted from Origin header if omitted).

codeChallenge.description: PKCE code challenge (SHA-256 hash of code_verifier, base64url). Auto-generated if omitted.

challenge_id.description: Challenge ID from the underlying provii-verifier challenge.

short_code.description: 12-digit short code for accessibility (raw, without dashes).

submit_secret.description: Base64url-encoded submit secret for proof submission (43 chars).

cutoff_days.description: Age cutoff in epoch days (e.g. 6570 for 18 years).

verifying_key_id.description: Verifying key ID for the ZK circuit.

status_url.description: URL to poll for status updates.

verify_url.description: URL to submit the zero knowledge proof.

csrf_token.description: CSRF token for subsequent mutating requests (omitted if CSRF protection is disabled).

status.description: Current session state (pending, proof_ok, verified, expired).

proof_verified.description: Whether the proof has been verified.

poll_after.description: Suggested next poll time (Unix timestamp seconds).

remaining_checks.description: Remaining status checks before rate limit.

code_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier (43-128 unreserved characters, RFC 7636 appendix B).

status.description: Session state, always verified on success.

expires_at.description: When the session expires (Unix timestamp seconds).

csrf_token.description: CSRF token to include in X-CSRF-Token header on subsequent mutating requests.

status.description: Logout outcome, always logged_out on success.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key issued to relying parties. Verified via Argon2id (provii-verifier/src/security/auth.rs:412). Expert verifiers additionally embed an `Authorizer` envelope (key_id + timestamp + nonce + HMAC-SHA256 over the canonical request body) inside the request payload, not as a separate header. See provii-verifier/src/security/auth.rs:664 (verify_hmac) and provii-verifier/src/types/auth.rs.
